title: The future of software engineering, tokenmaxxing and AI in higher education
summary: IBM Technology's Mixture of Experts podcast explores how software engineering is evolving in the AI era, discusses tokenmaxxing as companies deplete annual AI budgets rapidly, covers NVIDIA's RTX Spark superchip enabling large models on personal devices, and examines AI literacy challenges in higher education as students enter transformed workplaces.
